antipattern.symptom: One Pydantic model attempts to cover every doc type.
antipattern.fix: Split schemas per doc type; router selects the right one.

antipattern.symptom: Extracted output flows directly to billing.
antipattern.fix: Add deterministic post-validator; veto on totals mismatch.

antipattern.symptom: Confidence score is one number per document.
antipattern.fix: Emit per-field scores; review queue acts on lowest-scoring fields.
